title: Eutacta excelsa
intro: Unfortunately, there is not much information about the plant Eutacta excelsa.
taxonomy: Eutacta excelsa is a species of palm tree native to the tropical regions of the world. It belongs to the family Arecaceae, commonly known as the palm family. The genus Eutacta is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species. This species is also sometimes placed in the genus Arecaceae subfamily Coryphoideae but further classification is needed. Further research is required to determine more specific classification details for Eutacta excelsa.
